title: Sqlitelogictest crash on complex case statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, status VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'active');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 10), (3, -5);
SELECT id, CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 'no value' WHEN value < 0 THEN 'negative' ELSE 'positive' END AS value_status FROM test_table;

SELECT id, CASE WHEN NOT -10 IS NULL AND NULL IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN -39 * -89 NOT IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) THEN COUNT(*) END AS complex_case FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
UPDATE test_table SET status = CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 'inactive' ELSE 'active' END WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Complex case statement with nested conditions
